titleStmt.title: SII 15.67: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 67. (B.K. No. 55 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the roof of the Gaṇēśa shrine near the Girls' School

The inscription contains two dates. One is the fourth regnal year of the king, Viśvāvasu, Pushya śu. 2, Wednesday, corresponding to 1185 A.D., December 25. The other is Pushya śu. 8, Sunday in the same year. The tithi corresponds to 1185 A.D., December 31, the weekday being Tuesday.

On the first date are registered, among others, gifts made for the worship of the god in the Nōmpiya Basadi, and for burning a lamp before the deity Kammaṭēśvara at Lokkiguṇḍi. On the second date are recorded a series of donations made for the worship of the deity Śāntinātha in Kammaṭa-jinālaya by several members of the artisan community of the same place. The gifts were made in the presence of the One Thousand Mahājanas, all the Gōles and Gō-Brāhmaṇas of Lokkiguṇḍi which is said to be an agrahāra created by Śrī-Rāma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabha ṭṭāraka
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōtta
rābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire © svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyā
nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa japasamādhiśīlasaṁpanna¨rssamastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkṛta¨rvvidita
vēdā¨rtthavidyāpāraga¨rṣaṭka¨rmanirata¨rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛta śarīra¨rcca
tu¨rvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśadha¨rmmaśāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhai¨ryya¨rddhai¨ryyaparākrama rāśri
tajanakalpavṛkṣarahitapakṣakṣayakara¨rkkaliyugagāṁgēya¨rppara�ḷāhavadura
ndhara¨rśāpānugrahasama¨rttha¨rkkā¨ryyabṛhaspatigaḷēkaikapaṁḍita¨rggrāmanāmōttama¨rvvai ṣṇavagīti
manōhara¨rppāpabhīrugaḷparanārīdūra¨rdduṣṭavidhvaṁsaka¨rvviśiṣṭajanāśraya¨rkkāmakrō dhalōbha
mōhaviva¨rjjita¨rddvātriṁsatsahasrasamayā¨rghyā¨rha¨rdvi jakuḷatiḷaka¨rśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁja ra¨rssa
mastaguṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa śrī rāmaradattimahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṁḍiyūroḍeya pra
mukha mahājanaṁ śrī sāsi¨rvvaruṁ samastagōle gōbrāhmaṇa¨rmmodalāgi sabālavṛddha ¨rnneredu dha
¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ surakṣitamāge rakṣisuttamire . © vananidhiparivṛta vasudeyoḷa va
menaloppuvagrahāraṁ lakṣmīghanakucataṭāgrahāramidanikuṁ śrī lokkiguṁḍi mūṟuṁ jagadoḷ . ©
© śrīge vibhūtiṁge dha¨rmmakkāgaramenaliṁdranaggadamarāvatigaṁ bhōgāvatigaṁ sale mēlā gippudu
dharege lokkiguṁḍigrāmaṁ . Iṁtenisidī grāmadoḷage © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī viśvaka¨rmma
ni¨rmmitavāstuprāsādamaka ttra cchēdhacittacchēda gaṇa ®kōṭi mukhyābharaṇa¨rmmaṇi
kanakaratnattrayar ghaṭāpa kakaṭisūtranigaḷaka¨rṇnakuṇḍaḷakēyūrahāra kaṭa
makuṭaratnatraya ka¨rmmaka tiṣṭhādhikar bhṛkuṭisādhāraṇa¨rllaṁkōddhṛtahēma kūṭa
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvavaruṣada 4 neya viśvāvasu saṁvatsarada puśya
śudda 2 budhavāraduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdina puṇyatithiyoḷ Ūro
ḍaya pramukha śrī sannidhānadoḷ nōṁpiya basadiya dēvaraṣṭavidhā¨rcca nege Accina
moḷeya kēṇikāṟa viṣṇu yciseṭṭiyaru biṭṭa ha 5 mattaṁ hanni¨rvvaru Ajjiya
ka satvaguṇadalu va[¨rṣa]kke biṭṭa paṇa 1 mattaṁ seṭigaru kaṁmaṭēśvara sū
ḍareṇnege mūṟara dīvige ṇeya hanni¨rvvaru naḍasuvaru . mattaṁ beḷḷigaṁmaṭadavaru Ajji
ya vastradānakkeṁdu saṁkramaṇadalu kammaṭakke biṭṭa paṇa 1 mattaṁ baḍagi kammāra
ru vokkalalondu horeyamaṁ hannasuṁ dhānyadalu baḷḷa vondumaṁ biṭṭaru . Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ
nūṟippattu kottaḷigaḷu tamma dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisuva hāge pratipāḷisuvaru .
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyacakrava¨rtti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvaradēvava¨rṣada 4 neya viśvāvasu saṁ
vatsarada puśya suddha Aṣṭami Ādityavāradaṁdu śrī rāmaradatti śrī lokkiguṁḍiya Ūroḍeya pra
mukha śrī sāsi¨rvvara priyaputrarappa Asēsa kotaḷi mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe . mattaṁ svasti śrī visvaka¨rmma
[ni¨rmi]tavā māṭakūṭa sikharasikhara mānōnumānamahi� taru siva pāda sēkha raru A
catusameya sameAtigaḷu padineṇṭu yōgapīṭhapratiṣṭhitaruṁ liṁgastaṁ bha dvāra pra
taru patracitravicitrakuśaḷaru . paṁcāradiṁnavasanakapravīṇaru sa �vīra
yaṁtrayaṁtraprasidharumappa Asēsakotaḷigaḷu mukhyavāgi puṇyōdaya kēsavadē vara mādivōja dēvōja
ya �ṭada hiriya kētōja ruddhōja rāmōjanuṁ nāgīṁdra kēsavadēvara vōjayi tarū
vāri gaṇapōjanu . śrī sāntināthadēvara vōjayivaru sōvōja rāmōja kētōjana
kēsavadēvara sōvōja dāḷiseṭṭiya bammōja Ayiseṭṭiyara jinnōja Intu I
varu mukhyavāgi samasta Anādisaṁsiddhamappa śrī
kammaṭa jinālayada śrī śāṁtināthadēvarige Aṣṭavidhā¨rccanege biṭṭaru koḍatige
hāga Oṁdu 1 vōjugaḷe hāga 2 mattaṁ . ruvārigaḷu pratumegaḷa māḍuva bele kaṭida
li honna baḷiya bēḷeya kuḍuvaru 2 . I dha¨rmma taṁtamma dha¨rmmavāgi svadha¨rmmadi naḍa
sidava¨rgge mahāpuṇya tī¨rtthagaḷa miṁda phalavaku . Ida naḍasadava¨rgge paṁcama
hāpātakarakku .A few more letters are
Digital edition of SII 15.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
